correlationId.description: Groups related messages together, allowing for easy tracking and correlation of events across systems. All messages that are part of the same workflow or transaction should share the same correlationId.

messageId.description: A unique identifier for this specific message instance.

eventType.description: The type of event in the format of <domain>.<entity>.<action> (e.g., automation.run.failed, monitoring.alert.opened).

source.description: The source or origin of the event in the format of <domain>.<resource> (e.g., azuredevops.agentpool, github.workflow).

schemaVersion.description: Version of the payload schema for this event type.

importance.description: Indicates the importance or severity of the event. This can be used for filtering and prioritization. If not specified, it defaults to 'normal'.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the event was detected (e.g., 2026-04-21T13:45:30Z).

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Validate with event-specific schema based on the 'eventType' field.
